title: Fathers Only - Cobblemon
description: A custom Fabric-based modpack for the Fathers Only server featuring Cobblemon, fun content, and some eye candy!
body:
A custom Cobblemon modpack for the Fathers Only: Cobblemon server! A fully custom playthrough with Cobblemon as the star. There's also new terrain generation (via Tectonic) and a swath of new biomes with Terralith. Plus a whole bunch of performance enhancing mods to make this run not like garbage. Overall it's a good mix of content, performance, and ambiance! Enjoy!

## Screenshots
![The view from the village on our server!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9c85ce81383cd5d660ec0c389f948b5ec4654c6.jpeg)

![Cobblemon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967c4956d2827513c8573b62406ed8597a3f3fec.jpeg)

## Mods
- Cobblemon (obviously)
- Farmer's Delight
- Jade
- Supplementaries
- Distant Horizons
- Travelers Backpack
- Enhanced terrain gen
- and more!

Requires:
- Fabric 0.16.10
- Minecraft 1.21.1


## Important!
This serverpack is specifically for the Fathers Only server. No support will be provided with setup.

## Known Issues
- Server crashing bug with one of the trainer mods. Attempting to fix it with the latest patch.
